meta.title: AbotKamay — Free Internet Within Reach
meta.description: Free public WiFi across the Philippines. Watch a short ad, get 10 minutes of internet access. Connecting communities, one hotspot at a time.

hero.title: Free Internet
hero.description: AbotKamay WiFi provides free internet access to communities across the Philippines. Watch a short advertisement to unlock 10 minutes of internet access.
hero.mission: Our mission is to make connectivity accessible to everyone.
hero.phoneSubtitle: Watch a short ad to connect

howItWorks.label: How It Works
howItWorks.title: Three simple steps to get online
howItWorks.step1Desc: Find an AbotKamay hotspot in your area and connect your device. No password needed.
howItWorks.step2Desc: View a brief advertisement from a local or national brand. It only takes a moment.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Enjoy 10 minutes of free internet. Message your family, check your feed, get things done.

why.label: Why It Matters
why.title: Accessible Internet for Everyone
why.description: In the Philippines, millions of families rely on mobile data to stay connected. For many communities, internet access is still limited by affordability.
why.point1Desc: Public WiFi in local stores, community centers, transport hubs, and public spaces — where people already gather.
why.point2Desc: Advertisers connect directly with communities through short, respectful advertisements shown before access is granted.
why.point3Desc: When internet access is free at the point of use, everyone can participate in the digital world — regardless of income.
why.closing: Connectivity should not be a privilege. It should be accessible to everyone.

stories.label: Stay Connected
stories.title: Bringing families closer
stories.description: Millions of Filipino families have members working overseas. Internet connectivity allows them to stay in touch through messaging, calls, and video — no matter the distance.
stories.story1Desc: Access to educational resources and online research, right from the neighborhood WiFi hotspot.
stories.story2Desc: A mother video-calling her husband working abroad. A grandmother seeing her grandchild for the first time. These moments matter.
stories.story3Desc: Sari-sari store owners checking orders, accepting digital payments, and connecting with suppliers — all from free WiFi.

advertising.label: For Advertisers
advertising.title: Reach communities across the Philippines
advertising.description: AbotKamay serves as a platform that connects businesses with users directly through short advertisements displayed before internet access is granted.
advertising.benefit1Desc: Full-screen ads with complete user attention. No skipping, no scrolling past.
advertising.benefit2Desc: Reach specific communities and neighborhoods where your audience lives and shops.
advertising.benefit3Desc: Track impressions, engagement, and reach across every hotspot in the network.
advertising.benefit4Desc: Lower cost per impression than traditional media, with higher engagement rates.

vision.label: Our Vision
vision.title: Building connectivity infrastructure for the Philippines
vision.description: Our long-term goal is to build one of the largest digital advertising and connectivity platforms in the Philippines. By combining public WiFi infrastructure with advertising technology, AbotKamay aims to create a network that connects communities while supporting local businesses.

contact.label: Get In Touch
contact.title: Partner with us
contact.description: Interested in deploying WiFi in your area or advertising on our platform? We would love to hear from you.

coverage.label: Where We Are
coverage.title: WiFi wherever you are
coverage.description: We deploy hotspots in the places where people need connectivity the most.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.description: Simple plans, scale as you grow. All plans include our core WiFi platform.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about AbotKamay WiFi.

items.a: Users connect to our WiFi network, watch a short advertisement (usually 10–30 seconds), and receive 10 minutes of free internet access. After the session ends, they can watch another ad to continue browsing.

items.q: How do I earn revenue as a hotspot owner?
items.a: When users connect to your hotspot and watch ads, you receive 50% of the advertising revenue. Video ads earn ₱3.00 per view and image ads earn ₱2.00 per view. Payments are processed monthly via GCash or bank transfer.

items.q: What equipment do I need to set up a hotspot?
items.a: You need a standard WiFi router and an internet connection. We provide all the software, splash page, and ad delivery system. Our team will guide you through the setup process.

items.q: Is it free for users to use?
items.a: Yes, 100% free for end users. They only need to watch a short advertisement. No data plan, no payment, no registration required.

items.q: Can I advertise on the AbotKamay network?
items.a: Absolutely! We welcome local and national businesses to advertise on our platform. You can target specific communities, neighborhoods, and locations. Contact us to learn about advertising packages.

items.q: What areas do you currently cover?
items.a: We are currently expanding across the Philippines, starting with key communities in Metro Manila and nearby regions. We are actively deploying new hotspots and welcome partnerships to expand coverage.
